title: Real Tevar
subTitle: Harsha is the idealistic scion of a self-made multimillionaire, Ravikanth. After a chance meeting with Charuseela leads him to a remote village, Harsha wishes to develop it with her help.

title: Saaho
subTitle: An undercover agent and his partner go after a thief who has stolen 2,000 crore rupees. Soon, they realise that the case is linked to the death of a crime lord and an emerging gang war.

title: Daring Rakhwala
subTitle: An intoxicated dog bites a security guard, unleashes a zombie outbreak. A traffic officer takes up the responsibility to find the antidote.

title: Vaishnavi
subTitle: Born with the divine power, Vaishnavi receives treatment as a goddess by the villagers. After getting killed, she possesses the body of another girl who looks like her to exact revenge for her death.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: Don Aur Doctor
subTitle: The life of an honest doctor changes forever after an injured gangster, who is on the run, arrives at his clinic for treatment.

title: Aravind Sametha Veera Raghava
subTitle: A young man sets out to avenge his father's death but soon realises that violence is not the key to his salvation. His life changes when he meets another man, who helps him rediscover himself.

title: Andaaz
subTitle: After his sweetheart Kajal marries another man, Raj moves to Cape Town. He eventually agrees to marry Jiya but is shocked to find that she is Kajal's widowed sister-in-law.

title: Gangubai Kathiawadi
subTitle: A woman is forced to abandon her Bollywood dreams after her boyfriend sells her to a brothel. As time passes, she builds strong connections in the criminal underworld and rises to power.

title: Dabangg 2
subTitle: Inspector Chulbul Pandey oversees the operations of the local police station in Kanpur. However, things take a turn when he kills the brother of a local politician.

title: Himmatwar
subTitle: The son of a wealthy man leaves his family post a misunderstanding. Later, when he saves a police officer from an evil man, this results in him earning the latter's wrath.

title: Valimai
subTitle: Arjun, a police officer, sets out on a mission to hunt down a group of violent bikers after they are involved in a theft and murder. When a city's crime rate rises, it is up to Arjun, a police officer, to restore order.

title: Encounter Man 2
subTitle: Upon arriving in India to sell his ancestral palace and avoid bankruptcy, a man finds himself in peril when he is kidnapped.

title: Bastar: The Naxal Story
subTitle: A government official grapples with the uproar of leftist extremism in Bastar that has claimed thousands of lives and drained the country's financial resources.

title: Kakuda
subTitle: Sunny is a resident of Rathodi, a village haunted by a resentful spirit. When a small mistake causes Sunny to be cursed, he approaches a ghost hunter to find a solution.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and urges devotees to walk the path of righteousness.

title: Maaligai
subTitle: A female police officer goes to an ancient palace to investigate. However, once she enters the palace, she gets a vision of her past life where she was a fierce and beautiful princess.

title: Mahaabali
subTitle: Seenu's debt-driven escape to Dubai accidentally reroutes him to Hyderabad. Upon arrival, a shocking discovery leads him to orchestrate a cunning plan.

title: A Flying Jatt
subTitle: Donning a mighty cape and a heart of gold, a quirky Punjabi superhero whooshes through low-altitude escapades and fights the humongous villain who threatens the world.

title: Vivah
subTitle: Poonam, a traditional young woman, gets engaged to Prem, a wealthy man. Their faith and love are tested when an accident occurs and leaves Poonam with first degree burns.

title: Echo
subTitle: Desperation sets in when Prakash's failing marriage is threatened by something otherworldly, prompting him to resort to black magic. He soon uncovers shocking family revelations.

subTitle: After some mysterious instances at a temple of historical significance, a detective visits the region to investigate and find out the truth behind the incidents.

title: Police Power
subTitle: A police officer tries to change his younger brother, who turns to a life of crime, but he fails. He then takes on the local gangster responsible for inciting youngsters towards crime.

subTitle: Before getting married to his lady-love, a man visits a temple where he inadvertently insults Lord Ganesha whose mount takes offence and sends a mouse to wreck his life.

title: Mr. Zoo Keeper
subTitle: A zookeeper dedicated to taking care of wild animals finds himself in a difficult situation with law enforcement officials.
When mobiles start flying from people's hands, Dr Vaseegaran and his robot Nila are asked to help. However, due to Pakshi Rajan having a hand in this, the two have to reinstate Chitti to defeat him.

title: Ramaiya Vastavaiya
subTitle: A man is challenged to work in a field and produce a huge harvest by the end of the season in order to marry the love of his life.

title: Jai Ho
subTitle: A former Indian military officer devises a unique plan to promote social responsibility amongst apathetic civilians. The masses embrace his initiative, but he must confront a potent political family.

subTitle: Chulbul Pandey, a police officer, battles a corrupt political leader, Cheddi Singh, who strains Chulbul's relationship with his step-brother.
